description: Production-grade plugin hooks for cross-session project enforcement

hooks.command: _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R=$(python3 -c "import json,os; p=os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'); d=json.load(open(p)) if os.path.exists(p) else []; print(next((x.get('installPath','') for x in (d if isinstance(d,list) else list(d.values())) if 'nagisanzenin/production-grade' in str(x.get('name',''))),'')); " 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/nagisanzenin/production-grade"; bash "$_R/hooks/session-guard.sh"
